# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  DEPLOYMENT_TAG: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
    - ./build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - ./run_tests.sh
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the project with tag $DEPLOYMENT_TAG..."
    - ./deploy.sh $DEPLOYMENT_TAG
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: manual
